title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: As a pivotal member of our engineering team, you will report directly to the Backend Lead and play a crucial role in shaping our technical direction. You thrive on the challenge of transforming concepts into remarkable solutions and are well-versed in a variety of backend technologies, along with an understanding of best architectural practices.

title: Sr. Growth Marketer
summary: HighLevel is seeking multiple Senior Growth Marketers to help build and scale the growth marketing function.
requirements: 5+ years in growth marketing, product marketing, lifecycle, or product-led growth roles. Familiarity with SaaS platforms, product onboarding patterns, and B2B user journeys. Comfortable leading initiatives across multiple stakeholders and delivering results without needing formal authority.

title: Design Program Manager
summary: Design Program Manager role at HighLevel
requirements: 7+ years of experience in design program management, design operations, product operations, technical program management, or a related role. Experience in high-growth product environments. Deep understanding of product design and ability to improve workflows. Excellent communication skills. Strong judgment in structuring processes. Ability to build trust with cross-functional teams. Experience with design systems operations is a plus.

title: Software Development Engineer III (Fullstack) - Contacts
summary: Software Development Engineer III (Fullstack) - Contacts at HighLevel.
requirements: Proven experience in software development with a focus on fullstack solutions, familiarity with CRM systems, ability to drive technical outcomes, experience with building scalable and reliable systems.

title: Implementation Advisor
requirements: Experience in business process/change management and software technologies. Ability to implement software best practices and ensure adoption and success with HighLevel software.  Strong relationship-building skills with customers and understanding of business needs.

title: Field Marketing Representative
summary: HighLevel is seeking an outgoing Field Marketing Representative passionate about connecting with people and representing a powerful brand. This role involves heavy travel, event coordination, and brand ambassadorship.
requirements: Strong communication and interpersonal skills, ability to manage logistics and travel, experience in event marketing or brand representation, flexibility with travel-heavy schedules.

title: Staff Product Manager - Product Information Management
summary: Staff Product Manager - Product Information Management role at HighLevel. The role focuses on leading the vision, strategy, and execution of HighLevel's Product Information Management (PIM) system, enhancing catalog infrastructure to support various commerce activities. Responsibilities include defining the roadmap, architecting catalog overhaul, ensuring multi-team consumption, managing pricing strategies, and influencing the broader commerce roadmap.
requirements: 10+ years of product management experience, expertise in catalog systems, platform and API-first thinking, data modeling intuition, cross-functional influence, and a bias for ownership.

title: Staff Analytics Engineer – Customer Data Platform
summary: Staff Analytics Engineer – Customer Data Platform

title: Sr. Director, Product Design
summary: Seeking a Senior Director, Product Design to lead design strategy and execution for HighLevel’s product portfolio. Responsibilities include evolving the design system, guiding design across multiple product teams, coaching design managers, and ensuring alignment with Product, Engineering, and executive leadership.
requirements: 10+ years of experience in product design, including 5+ years in design leadership. Proven experience leading design in B2B SaaS or multi-product ecosystems, strong visual and interaction design skills. Experience building design systems, managing teams, and driving measurable business outcomes is essential.

title: Manager, Events
summary: The Manager, Events is responsible for leading the strategy, planning, coordination, and execution of HighLevel’s global event portfolio. This leader manages multimillion-dollar budgets, directs a global events team, and collaborates cross-functionally to ensure events align with organizational goals.
requirements: Overall 8+ Years of Experience with 3 years of people management experience. Bachelor’s degree in Event Management, Hospitality, Marketing, Business, or related field (or equivalent experience). 3–5+ years of experience in event planning or event management, preferably within SaaS or high-growth environments. Experience leading event teams or cross-functional execution. Ability to operate effectively under pressure and resolve real-time issues. Willingness to travel as required. Proficiency in event management platforms (e.g., Eventbrite, Cvent) and Microsoft Office Suite.

title: Staff Product Manager - Phone Numbers and A2P
summary: As the Staff Product Manager for Phone Number, A2P & Compliance at HighLevel, you will own the strategy, execution, and evolution of HighLevel’s messaging compliance and phone number ecosystem, partnering closely with various teams to deliver reliable, compliant, and scalable messaging experiences worldwide.
requirements: 12+ years of total experience, including ownership of communications, telecommunications, compliance or platform infrastructure products, deep understanding of A2P messaging ecosystems, strong understanding of phone number lifecycle management, experience working directly with communication providers, demonstrated success translating complex regulatory requirements into scalable product experiences, experience building onboarding, verification, registration, or compliance workflows at scale, exceptional communication skills.

title: Director of Partnerships
summary: Director of Partnerships role at Employ, focusing on managing partnerships, increasing revenue, and owning the full partner lifecycle across referral, resell, and strategic alliances. Requires assessing existing partnerships and building scalable frameworks for growth in a remote-first environment.
requirements: Must have experience in partnership management, strong communication skills, ability to operate at executive levels, and a proven track record in building revenue through partnerships.

title: Corporate FP&A Manager
summary: HighLevel is seeking a Corporate FP&A Manager to join our growing FP&A team. This is a high-visibility, execution-oriented role at the center of our consolidated reporting, forecasting, and investor-facing deliverables. You’ll partner closely with senior members of the FP&A team - taking ownership of recurring reporting and forecasting workstreams - while contributing to the corporate model, the strategic planning process, and the materials that go to senior leadership, the Board, and external stakeholders.
requirements: Experience in corporate finance, financial planning and analysis (FP&A), or a similar field; Strong analytical skills and attention to detail; Ability to work in a fast-paced SaaS environment.

title: Sr. Product Manager - Phone Platform
summary: The Senior Product Manager for Phone Platform will drive strategy, execution, and growth of HighLevel’s communication and monetisation platform, focusing on voice, messaging, billing, pricing, and account lifecycle management. The role requires collaboration with multiple teams and a blend of strong execution skills with commercial thinking.
requirements: 7+ years of Product Management experience in SaaS, platform, fintech, telecom, CPaaS or related technology environments. Proven track record of shipping and scaling customer-facing and platform products from concept to launch. Experience managing product roadmaps, prioritisation frameworks, and cross-functional delivery processes. Strong understanding of product discovery, customer research, experimentation, and data-driven decision making. Experience developing go-to-market plans and partnering with Marketing, Sales and Customer Success teams on successful product launches. Demonstrated experience working on pricing, packaging, monetisation, or usage-based business models. Ability to balance customer needs, technical constraints, and business objectives when making product decisions. Strong analytical skills with experience leveraging SQL, BI tools, dashboards, or product analytics platforms. Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels. Comfortable operating in fast-paced, highly collaborative environments with multiple concurrent initiatives. Strong ownership mindset with a bias toward execution, accountability and measurable outcomes.
